falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower lows and consolidation; breaking to new highs indicates the macro engine misidentified the structure and the signal should have been BULLISH not HOLD/accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained sub-12.50 VIX would contradict the elevated volatility regime implied by a bottoming pattern with blowoff score 40; it would signal complacency and risk-on continuation rather than the anticipated volatility expansion or basing behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 2+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-quality bid of that magnitude with rates collapsing through key support would indicate recession/de-risking dynamics inconsistent with a 'bottom' call; the pattern expects stabilization or rising yields with equities basing, not rates collapsing with equities flat or falling

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
